name: Switch
description: Boolean toggle. Off/On states with optional label + description. Maps to shadcn/ui Switch.
$matrixNote: 5 axes — twice the dimensional complexity of Button's 3-axis matrix. Stress-tests SP-1 exposedProps filtering + variantConstraints across more permutations. Bundle counts 64 cells = 2 × 2 × 4 × 2 × 2.

$missingStates.$comment: Apollo v2 Switch's state axis is 4 values (Default/Disabled/Focus/Invalid). Compare Button's 6 (Default/Hover/Focus/Loading/Disabled/Pressed).
$auditFindings: F5 (MEDIUM): Switch lacks Hover state — no mouse-hover visual feedback on track or thumb.
F6 (LOW): Switch lacks Pressed state — toggle interaction has no visible down-feedback.
F-7 (LOW): Switch lacks Loading state — no busy-async-toggle cue (Button has it via SP-5 swapDefaults; Switch could mirror).

exposedProps.name: descriptionText
exposedProps.description: Helper / description text below the label.

slots.name: track
slots.$role: The pill-shaped toggle background. Color changes by active + state.

default.$heightAuditFinding: F9 (MEDIUM): Track height 18.4px not bound to any token. Apollo v2 has no height/h-* at 18.4; closest is h-4 (16) or would need new h-4-5 (18). Source-DS audit candidate.

sm.$tbdReason: size=sm track height not yet walked. Likely smaller (~14px) given pattern.

slots.$borderPatternNote: Track has a 2px transparent border that acts as breathing room between thumb and track edge. Clever pattern; the thumb's effective travel range = (track-width − thumb-width − 2×border-spacing). Document so consumers don't strip the transparent border thinking it's a no-op.

slots.name: thumb
slots.$role: The round movable circle. Color stays consistent; position shifts on active.

default.$shape: square frame with rounded-full radius = effective circle

slots.$positionNote: Thumb position is animation-driven: at left edge of inner-track when active=Off, at right edge when active=On. Captured by SP-9 motion descriptor (see animations[] below).

fill.$invalidNote: Likely shifts to destructive on Invalid state to signal the error. Verify in Step 3.

container.$controlPlacementNote: controlPlacement=Start → track first, then Field Content. controlPlacement=End → Field Content first, then track. itemOrder flips.
container.$widthNote: Container width is FIXED at 312px (Type=Default) or 300px (Type=Box). Hardcoded, not bound. Audit signal.

track.$paddingNote: 1px raw, not from a spacing token. Source-DS audit: should be a fractional spacing token (no spacing/0-25 exists at 1px) OR removed in favor of border-2 transparent technique.

bindings.$comment: Switch has a richer per-axis-combination binding map than Button. Some properties depend on multiple axes (e.g. track fill = function of active + state).

radius.$comment: Track and thumb are universally pill-rounded. Box-type frame uses rounded-lg (10px).

Off.$confirmed: Walked cell 428:1425 (default/Off/Default/Default/Start). Track fill = input-dark-input-80 (#a3a3a3 gray) in Off state. Other state cells inferred from pattern; confirm in Step 3.

On.$tbdStep3: Inferred: On track fills to primary (or destructive on Invalid). Verify per cell.

thumb-fill.$comment: Thumb stays #fafafa across all 64 cells. Travel changes by active; color does not.

focus-ring.$invalidNote: Invalid state likely uses destructive focus ring (matches Button's Destructive variant convention). Confirm via cell 21141:9448.

opacity.$disabledNote: Switch uses opacity-50 for Disabled. Audit Finding 8 (NEW): inconsistent with Button (which uses tinted color, not opacity). Cross-component DS inconsistency. Recommend standardizing — either all-opacity or all-tinted-color.
opacity.$confirmedNote: opacity-50 token observed in Switch tokens.json; confirm per-cell application via Step 3.

Default.$role: Compact inline layout — label + description next to a bare track. No frame around the component.

Box.$role: Boxed layout — label + description + track inside a bordered container. For form-field placement parity.
Box.$tbdStep3: Box-type cell not yet walked. Confirm padding-y + per-state border behavior.

controlPlacement-axis.$role: Layout-only — flips item order in the horizontal container. No visual identity change.

transition.$tbdStep5: Prototype interaction not yet walked. Estimated duration/easing per Apollo v2 motion taste (150-300ms ease-out per Button audit layer 2). Confirm via prototype.json extraction in Step 5.

animations.$animationDescription: Thumb slides horizontally from left edge to right edge of inner-track. Concurrent: track fill transitions from input-dark-input-80 (gray) → base/primary (violet) — or base/destructive on Invalid.

motionReduce.$reason: SP-9 v0.3.0: state-transition animations like Switch toggle should use `skip` policy under prefers-reduced-motion. Reduced-motion users see Off → On as an instant variant change (no slide). Slowing the slide to 4s (Spinner-style) would feel laggy. Freezing would lose information. `skip` preserves the state change while removing the motion.

touchTargetCompliance.$auditFinding: 32 of 64 cells (all Type=Default) fail WCAG 2.5.5. Type=Box meets it. Documented signal; not a bundle blocker. Recommend Type=Box for primary touch surfaces.

ariaInvalid.$comment: Switch in Invalid state should emit aria-invalid="true". Apollo v2 should pair the visual Invalid state with this ARIA attribute.

candidates.$note: shadcn Switch has variant=on/off mapped via `checked` prop; size axis not in shadcn baseline (Apollo v2 adds `sm` size). Type=Box also Apollo-specific.

$step1_token_findings: 39 tokens used; 17 NEW vs Button bundle (w-8, h-3, border-2, rounded-lg, font-weight/normal, 3 typography compounds, spacing/2-5 + spacing/3, opacity-50, base/foreground/border/ring, 3 custom alpha colors).
Switch uses opacity-50 for Disabled — Button uses tinted color. Cross-component DS inconsistency (Finding 8 candidate).

$step2_known_gaps.field: Track height 18.4px raw, no token binding (Finding 9 candidate)
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: Source-DS audit: add height/h-4-5 (18px) token OR document raw 18.4 as intentional

$step2_known_gaps.field: size=sm track height not yet walked
Type=Box cell details (padding-y, per-state border behavior)
Animation timing (duration + easing) on toggle transition
Per-state track-fill for On + state combinations
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: Walk cells per state axis on active=On

$step2_known_gaps.field: Container fixed widths (312/304/300/296) raw, not bound
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: Source-DS audit: bind to width tokens OR document as intentional fixed sizes

v0.2.0: SP-1 — whenVariant/whenSize filters not yet exercised (Switch slots labelText + descriptionText apply to all variants; no axis-conditional suppression)
SP-2 — variantConstraints empty array (no axis combinations forbidden)
SP-3 — n/a (no textDecoration usage in Switch)
SP-4 — $bindingStatus: hardcoded fires on track height (18.4px), container widths, padding-x: 1px
SP-6 — codeConnect URL not yet verified (only 1 doc link)
SP-7 — Per-side padding + clipsContent: pending Step 3 walk (Type=Default has no padding so trivially fine; Type=Box has spacing/3 padding)
SP-8 — Nested-instance tokens: nothing nested at this depth (track + thumb are direct children, not INSTANCE refs)
v0.3.0: SP-4 extension — semantically-mismatched: not observed in Switch (no cross-axis token use yet)

SP-9 — APPLIED to animations[0].motionReduce. Toggle uses policy=skip (state-transition animation, not looping). Validates SP-9 policy enum across both `slow` (Button Spinner) and `skip` (Switch toggle).
